discovery_context_policy.context_derivation: V63 discovery uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only; V61/V62 labels and post-seal holdout classes are not used for prediction context
reasons: RCSB public non-coordinate component list contains biological cofactor candidates: ['CLA', 'HEC']
RCSB public metadata indicates multiple copies or assembly context
RCSB public metadata or strong sequence field indicates membrane/topology context

prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: Single-conformation model re-refinement of 2F/S3-rich PSII intermediate structure at 2.09 Angstrom resolution. Entity description: Photosystem II reaction center protein H. Organism: Thermosynechococcus vestitus BP-1. Polymer composition: heteromeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived membrane tendency high; sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies. Coordinates, native contacts, residue-residue distances, and validation annotations are unopened before the prediction hash.

V63 discovery metadata context marks: assembly_context cofactor_context heme_context heteromeric_context ligand_context membrane_context_strong oligomer_context partner_copy_context transmembrane_context. Marks come from sequence and public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only; coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, and native topology are blocked before sealing.
